added.title: The Arrival
added.description: As the Workers' District faces extreme strain and Elu's political climate worsens, Iyanu intensifies her training with Mama Sewa while two formidable military forces converge on the Riverlands Settlement to capture her.

added.title: The Source Part II
added.description: Iyanu reaches The Source and faces a devastating choice about her destiny. As Elu teeters on the brink of destruction from the Corrupt, Iyanu's allies fight a final battle against Chancellor Nuro and the Fallen One.

added.title: The Pink Painter Strikes Again
added.description: They're baaaaack! All 16 Campers from Season One return for more spills, thrills and dramaaaaa! And a very special guest arrives on the island to really mess things up. Hope everyone packed an extra pair of pants!

added.title: Taking it to the Rim Reaper
added.description: Things get wet, wild and gross when the Campers play waterslide basketball!

added.title: You Poor Saps
added.description: Tensions run high in this week's challenge when the Campers find themselves in a sticky situation.

added.title: Choosin' For a Bruisin'
added.description: Our campers get tested on how well they know each other. Correct answers could win them immunity, but incorrect answers drop them into a pool of hungry wolverines.

added.title: Ice to Beat You
added.description: A chilling challenge inside an iceberg leads to the coldest elimination of the season.

added.title: Canoe Believe It?
added.description: During a fun-filled day of canoe jousting, a special friendship is founded and an outed cheater gets pounded.

added.title: The Truth, The Pole Truth and Nothing But the Truth
added.description: If spending the day balancing on a pole under the direct sun with no food in your tummy sounds like a fun time you are going to love today's challenge.

added.title: Tortoise Rigamortis
added.description: With just 5 campers remaining things are getting tense. So today is just about having fun taking selfies with wild animals. Everyone had their rabies shot?

added.title: Caved by the Bell
added.description: The final 4 get must wander through a dark and spooky cave hunting for coins. The challenge only gets worse when they discover that something is also hunting them.

added.title: Magma Cum Laude
added.description: This is it! Today one of the 3 remaining campers will become a millionaire. The only thing standing in their way is 2 other campers, a forest, some lava, some violent goats, a mountain, and vomit. Other than that, pretty easy.

added.title: Panda's Art
added.description: Panda paints a portrait of Charlie and it's a hit with his art class. But after an art dealer offers to buy the painting, Panda has to get it back from Charlie.

added.title: Poppy Rangers
added.description: Ranger Tabes leads a troop of young girls into a cave expedition, and brings Grizz as their cave expert.

added.title: Lucy's Brother
added.description: To impress Lucy Panda offers to babysit her brother, Clifford. But Clifford turns out to be too high maintenance for Panda to handle.

added.title: The Fair
added.description: The Baby Bears make a deal with a carnival worker to be prizes for a game of ball toss.

added.title: Private Lake
added.description: When the local lake is overcrowded with tourists, the Bears have fun at Charlie's private lake.

added.title: Lunch with Tabes
added.description: When Tabes's lunch gets stolen, Tabes launches a full investigation to find the culprit.

added.title: Road Trip
added.description: Chloe and the Bears take a road trip to see a meteor shower. Ice Bear, the only one licensed to drive, is put in charge, which becomes harder than he thought.

added.title: Summer Love
added.description: Panda goes on a mission to return a lost phone to the girl of his dreams.

added.title: The Kitty
added.description: After a mishap in the forest, the Bears lose their own home to dangerous animals.

added.title: Crowbar Jones
added.description: Grizz screens an epic amateur movie he just made for a focus group. But when he notices people are leaving he must figure out ways to keep the audience engaged.

added.title: Chapter 16: Retrace Our Hooves
added.description: Susie makes contact in another realm.

added.title: Chapter 17: Meeting of Mounds
added.description: The Coven challenges The Cuties to an impromptu softball game.

added.title: Chapter 18: Swellington Boots
added.description: When a summer storm brews, the crew cozies up in the library.

added.title: Chapter 19: Weather Your Weather
added.description: Susie mulls over her past.

added.title: Chapter 20: It Takes Time
added.description: The island welcomes a new era.
